name: frontend
tagline: Router skill that dispatches frontend/UI work to design-taste, performance, and design-system reference files before building or auditing.
verdict: No secret access, destructive ops, sudo, or hidden/obfuscated content found; triggers and negative triggers are explicit and steps are actionable. Two soft risks for installers: it directs curl calls with an auto-minted token against an external site (lazyweb.com) for 'real product screen' research, and it leans on unbundled third-party repos (Owl-Listener/d

highlights.summary: Lazyweb research lane tells the agent to 'run its recipe verbatim' against lazyweb.com, noting 'the recipe mints its own anonymous token' (line 33) — outbound calls to a third-party site are baked int
